channel.title: Signature Assessments :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Signature assessments are the five formal, high-stakes assessment events distributed across the program. Each is a culminating instance of a recurring assessment type — it represents that type at its most consequential, typically involving real artifacts, peer or faculty audience, and no scaffolding. Code Archaeology Milestone Block 2 — CS-105 Code Reading & Repair Students investigate an unfamiliar, moderately complex codebase — written in languages they know — to explain its behavior, identify sources of unexpected behavior, and propose a repair. This is the first unscaffolded instance of the Code Archaeology recurring type.
